architecture.summary: Single SKILL.md file in plugins/specweave/skills/help/. No phases needed - output-only skill. Gathers context via specweave CLI commands (status, analytics). Registered in plugin.json.

integrations.summary: Integrates with specweave analytics (JSONL events), specweave status (increment metadata), and plugin system (plugin.json registration). No external service integration needed.

ui-ux.summary: Text-based output organized by workflow stage (Plan/Implement/Verify/Close/Sync/Explore/Media). Inline stats banner. Contextual next actions for active increments. Getting started for new users.

performance.summary: Lightweight - runs 2 CLI commands (status, analytics) with --json flag. No caching needed. Output is static text formatting.

security.summary: Read-only skill. No file writes, no secrets, no external API calls. Only reads increment metadata and analytics events.

edge-cases.summary: No .specweave/ dir = show getting started. No analytics data = skip stats section. No active increment = skip contextual actions. Empty project = minimal output with install guidance.
